name: chengyu
title: Chengyu Browser
description: Browse and search 30,000+ Chinese four-character idioms (成语) with meaning, etymology, and usage examples — backed by real data, not LLM generation
rationale: Discord signal: centronias built a 'Mandarin word of the day' workflow but destroyed it because the LLM only knew one interesting chengyu (message: 'The mandarin word of the day has been the same every day. The LLM has ONE interesting mandarin chengyu lol'). A lab backed by the chinese-xinhua dataset (30,895 real entries with etymology, usage examples, and pinyin) directly addresses the quality complaint — real data instead of LLM generation.
